disclaimer.text: Remember that tarot is a tool for guidance and self-knowledge. Readings offer perspectives and should not be taken as absolute predictions of the future.
disclaimer.extended: This service uses an artificial intelligence model to generate interpretations based on the archetypes and symbolism of the Rider-Waite tarot. It does not replace consultation with a professional tarot reader nor constitutes legal, financial, medical or any other type of professional advice. Decisions you make based on these readings are your sole responsibility. Card randomness is managed digitally and interpretation is generated in real time, meaning two identical questions will not necessarily produce the same answer.

terms.seoTitle: Terms and Conditions | Free Tarot Fun
terms.seoDescription: Terms and conditions of use for Free Tarot Fun. Learn about usage rules, payment plans, refund policy and more.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Free Tarot Fun (freetarot.fun). By accessing and using our service, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use, which together with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy govern the relationship of Free Tarot Fun with you in relation to this website.
terms.s1p1: Free Tarot Fun is an entertainment service that offers AI-generated tarot readings. The content of the pages of this website is for your general information and use only. It is subject to change without notice.
terms.s1p2: The use of any information or materials on this website is at your own risk, for which we shall not be liable. It shall be your own responsibility to ensure that any products, services or information available through this website meet your specific requirements.
terms.s1p3: The tarot readings provided by this service are solely for entertainment and self-exploration purposes. They should not be considered as professional, medical, legal, financial or psychological advice.
terms.s2free: Free Plan: 1 reading per day, limited history, 5 future reveals.
terms.s2trial: Initiation Ritual ($1 USD): 7 days of full access, unlimited readings, future always visible.
terms.s2monthly: Monthly Pass ($8 USD): 30 days of full access.
terms.s2annual: Annual Pass ($64 USD): 365 days of full access with the best value (33% savings).
terms.s2p1: Payments are processed securely through PayPal. We do not store credit card information on our servers.
terms.s2p2: One-time payments: All our payment plans are one-time purchases (not auto-renewing subscriptions). When your plan period ends, you will automatically return to the free plan unless you make a new purchase.
terms.s2p3: No auto-renewal: We do not charge automatically. You always have full control over when and whether you wish to renew your premium access.
terms.s3intro: We offer refunds under the following conditions:
terms.s3r1: Requests made within the first 7 days from purchase.
terms.s3r2: Not applicable if you have already significantly used the service (more than 10 readings).
terms.s3r3: Refunds are processed through the original payment method.
terms.s3refund: To request a refund, contact support{'@'}freetarot.fun indicating your registration email and reason for the request.
terms.s4intro: Our referral program allows you to earn rewards by inviting friends:
terms.s4free: Free users: Earn 5 extra readings for each friend who registers and completes their first reading.
terms.s4premium: Premium users: Earn additional subscription days according to their plan:
terms.s4c1: You cannot refer yourself or create fake accounts.
terms.s4c2: The referral must complete their first reading for the reward to be activated.
terms.s4c3: We reserve the right to suspend accounts that abuse the system.
terms.s4c4: We may modify or cancel the program at any time.
terms.s5intro: Our tarot interpretations are generated using advanced artificial intelligence models (OpenAI). It is important that you understand the following:
terms.s5i1: The interpretations are automatically generated and do not come from a human tarot reader.
terms.s5i2: The content is for entertainment, personal reflection and self-knowledge purposes.
terms.s5i4: If you need professional help, consult certified experts in the corresponding field.
terms.s6i1: The readings you receive are yours for personal use.
terms.s6i2: You can share your readings through our sharing feature. Shared readings are anonymous.
terms.s6i3: By using our service, you grant us a license to use the content of your questions (anonymously and in aggregate) to improve our services.
terms.s6i4: We do not share or sell your individual questions or readings to third parties.
terms.s7age: Minimum age: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. By registering, you confirm that you meet this requirement.
terms.s7prohibited: Prohibited uses: You may not use this service for:
terms.s7p2: Creating fake or multiple accounts to abuse the system
terms.s7p3: Attempting to access other users' accounts
terms.s8intro: The service is provided "as is" and "as available". We do not guarantee that:
terms.s8i1: The service will be available uninterrupted
terms.s8i2: The readings will be accurate or applicable to your situation
terms.s8i3: The results will meet your specific expectations
terms.s8liability: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:
terms.s8l1: We shall not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.
terms.s8l2: Our total liability is limited to the amount you have paid for the service in the last 12 months.
terms.s8l3: We are not responsible for decisions you make based on the readings.
terms.s9byUser: By the user: You can delete your account at any time from your profile or by contacting us. When you delete your account:
terms.s9u1: Any active subscription will be cancelled (no refund for the current period)
terms.s9u2: Your reading history will be deleted within 30 days
terms.s9u3: Your referral code will stop working
terms.s9byUs: By us: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that:
terms.s9b4: Harm other users or the service
terms.s10intro: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. When we make significant changes:
terms.s10i1: We will notify you by email or through a notice on the site
terms.s10i2: Changes will take effect 30 days after notification
terms.s10i3: Continued use of the service after changes implies your acceptance
terms.s10outro: If you do not agree with the new terms, you can cancel your account before they take effect.
terms.s11p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Peru, including Law No. 29733 (Personal Data Protection Law) and its Regulation (Supreme Decree No. 016-2024-JUS), which is compatible with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union.
terms.s11p2: For European Union users, we guarantee compliance with GDPR regarding the processing of your personal data.
terms.s11p3: To resolve any dispute, we will first attempt an amicable solution. If not possible, disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts of Lima, Peru.
terms.s12intro: If you have questions about these terms, you can contact us at:

privacy.seoDescription: Privacy policy for Free Tarot Fun. Learn how we collect, use and protect your personal information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how Free Tarot Fun (freetarot.fun) collects, uses, protects and shares your information when you use our service. We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with Peru's Personal Data Protection Law No. 29733 and its Regulation (S.D. No. 016-2024-JUS), as well as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union for our European users.
privacy.s1d1: Registration data: Name, email address, date of birth, gender (when you register with email or social networks).
privacy.s1d2: Oracle questions: The questions you ask during tarot readings.
privacy.s1d3: Preferences: Language, timezone and other profile settings.
privacy.s1a1: Usage data: Frequency of use, types of readings, interactions with the service.
privacy.s1a2: Technical information: IP address, browser type, device, operating system.
privacy.s1a3: Cookies and local storage: See our Cookie Policy for more details.
privacy.s1r2: Record of invitations sent and completed
privacy.s1anonP: If you use the service without registering, we store an anonymous session identifier in your browser to limit usage according to our terms. We cannot personally identify you with this data.
privacy.s2Title: 2. Third-Party Services That Process Your Data
privacy.s2intro: To provide our service, we share certain information with the following providers:
privacy.s2outro: Each of these providers has their own privacy policies and complies with data protection standards.
privacy.s3i1: Provide the service: Generate personalized tarot readings, maintain your history, sync across devices.
privacy.s3i2: Process payments: Manage subscriptions, billing and refunds.
privacy.s3i3: Manage the referral program: Track invitations and grant rewards.
privacy.s3i4: Improve the service: Analyze usage patterns (aggregated and anonymous) to improve the experience.
privacy.s3i5: Communications: Send you important notifications about your account. Promotional emails are only sent with your explicit consent.
privacy.s3i6: Security: Detect and prevent fraud, abuse or illegal activities.
privacy.s4intro: We retain your information for the following periods:
privacy.s4i1: Account and profile data: While your account is active.
privacy.s4i2: Reading history: While your account is active. You can request its deletion at any time.
privacy.s4i3: Payment data: According to legal billing requirements (up to 7 years for tax records).
privacy.s4i4: Referral data: Indefinitely to maintain program history.
privacy.s4i5: After account deletion: We delete your personal data within a maximum of 30 days, except when the law requires additional retention.
privacy.s5intro: We implement security measures to protect your information:
privacy.s5i1: Encryption in transit: All communications use HTTPS/TLS.
privacy.s5i2: Secure authentication: We use OAuth 2.0 through Supabase. We do not store passwords directly.
privacy.s5i3: Payment data: We do not store card numbers. PayPal processes all payments securely.
privacy.s5i4: Restricted access: Only authorized personnel have access to production systems.
privacy.s5outro: However, no system is 100% secure. If you discover a vulnerability, contact security{'@'}freetarot.fun.
privacy.s6intro: Your data may be processed on servers located outside your country, including:
privacy.s6i1: United States: OpenAI, ElevenLabs, part of Supabase infrastructure.
privacy.s6outro: When we transfer data outside the European Economic Area, we ensure that adequate safeguards are in place, such as EU standard contractual clauses or compliance with the EU-US data protection framework.
privacy.s7intro: As a user in the European Union (or if GDPR applies to you), you have the following rights:
privacy.s7i1: Access: Request a copy of all your personal data.
privacy.s7i2: Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.s7i3: Deletion: Request that we delete your data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.s7i4: Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s7i5: Objection: Object to the processing of your data for certain purposes.
privacy.s7i6: Restriction: Restrict how we process your data in certain circumstances.
privacy.s7i7: Withdraw consent: If processing is based on your consent, you can withdraw it at any time.
privacy.s7h1: Some options are available directly in your profile (edit, delete account).
privacy.s7h3: We will respond within a maximum of 30 days.
privacy.s7complaint: You also have the right to file a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy.s8intro: This service is intended exclusively for persons over 18 years of age.
privacy.s8i1: We do not knowingly collect information from persons under 18.
privacy.s8i2: If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.s8i3: If you are a parent/guardian and believe your child has provided us with information, contact privacy{'@'}freetarot.fun.
privacy.s9intro: We may update this privacy policy periodically. When we make significant changes:
privacy.s9i1: We will update the "Last updated" date at the top.
privacy.s9i2: We will notify you by email if the changes are substantial.
privacy.s9i3: We may display a notice on the website.
privacy.s9outro: We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
privacy.s10intro: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data:

cookies.seoDescription: Learn what cookies Free Tarot Fun uses, how we use them and how to manage your preferences.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This page describes what cookies are and how we use them at Free Tarot Fun (freetarot.fun).
cookies.s1p1: A cookie is a small file that asks permission to be placed on your computer's hard drive. Once you agree, the file is added and the cookie helps analyze web traffic or lets you know when you visit a particular site.
cookies.s2p1: We use traffic log cookies to identify which pages are being used. This helps us analyze data about webpage traffic and improve our website to tailor it to customer needs. We only use this information for statistical analysis purposes.
cookies.s2p2: Overall, cookies help us provide you with a better website, by enabling us to monitor which pages you find useful and which you do not. A cookie in no way gives us access to your computer or any information about you, other than the data you choose to share with us.
cookies.s3necessaryIntro: These cookies are essential for the operation of the site and cannot be disabled:
cookies.s3n2Purpose: Keeps your user session logged in
cookies.s3analyticsIntro: These cookies help us understand how you use the site and are only activated with your consent:
cookies.s4intro: In addition to cookies, we use your browser's local storage to improve your experience:
cookies.s4i1: Language preference: To remember your preferred language (Spanish or English)
cookies.s4i2: Geolocation data: To personalize readings based on your location (only if you authorize it)
cookies.s5intro: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the button below:
cookies.s6intro: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to alert you when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do so, some parts of the site may not function properly.
cookies.s6p2: For more information about how to manage cookies in your browser:
cookies.s7p1: If you have questions about our cookie policy, please also consult our Privacy Policy or Terms and Conditions.
